title: Baroness Finn resigns from the Committee on Standards in Public Life
body: "Doug Chalmers, Chair of the Committee, thanked Baroness Finn for her service to the Committee over the past three years.              Letter from Baroness Finn to Doug Chalmers    JPEG, 912 KB     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email public@public-standards.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.
